message:
chore(sync): drop duplicate #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]

`execute_import` already carries a combined
`#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines, clippy::too_many_arguments)]`
attribute on the line above; the standalone repeat was dead and
would warn as `duplicate_attributes` under future clippy lints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
